reviews.review_description: First time playing it I got so indicting I kept playing every day.    To owner:thx for the 1000 coins. From LILJERVR
It is the best game in the world

Ok, Im probably just saying this cause I’m a mod but this game is gooooood. Like really good. If you’re looking at this review then I highly recommend this game. The mods are active and SUPER nice. Same with the owner. (Speaking of owner if you see this i need to talk to you in game bout something.) So far, this game has Nextbots, Only Up, Fling Pvp, Horror, and Zero G. If you like any of these game modes, GET THIS GAME!!! I hope to see some more of you guys in server 1! See ya there!!!

-TheRealN3bs
